name: Grilled Portobello Sandwich with Goat Cheese and Green Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the green sauce ingredients in a blender.
2. Rub the portobello mushrooms with oil and season with salt and pepper.
3. Grill the mushrooms, rib side down first for four minutes.
4. Turn over and spoon the green sauce over the portobellos while on the grill.
5. Continue grilling for an additional 4 minutes.
6. Add slices of goat cheese and a little bit more of the green sauce.
7. Remove from the grill and allow to cool slightly.
